images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, radiating a joyful and radiant mood while biting her lip slightly. She is lounging on a poolside sunbed, wearing a trendy, sexy varsity jacket styled in a campus fashion theme, left unzipped to reveal a form-fitting bikini that accentuates her fit and curvy body with a slim waist and ample chest. The fabric textures of the jacket and swimwear are crisp and detailed. The scene is illuminated by a bright streetlight amber glow, creating a warm, professional clarity without heavy shadows, while the background features a cyberpunk aesthetic with neon purple and blue color grades, blurred into a creamy bokeh to focus on her. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
